author: saiken
description: Move new notes out of Inbox with fast local routing rules. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Israel Avila
manifest.description: Move new notes out of Inbox with fast local routing rules.
manifest.name: Vault Router

name: Vault Router

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Vault Router 0.2.0 — professional polish release

A focused hardening + polish pass on top of 0.1.2.

**Reliability**
- Prototype-pollution-safe frontmatter matching and bounded recursion on hostile nested values.
- Inbox membership and folder creation now agree under case/Unicode differences (Windows, macOS, mobile), ending silent no-route and endless re-rename edge cases.
- Notes matched via a list value are filed under the element that actually matched.
- Preview is now a faithful dry run; the inbox sweep's counts and "cap hit" upsell are accurate.

**Obsidian compliance**
- Note commands are checkCallback-gated; rule modal uses the long-stable title API for older clients.

**Security**
- Stronger path-segment sanitization: control characters, reserved device names with extensions, and surrogate-safe length capping.

**Experience & clarity**
- Settings lead with setup and present Pro last; a single, restrained upgrade card.
- Honest Free-vs-Pro copy throughout; README opens with the one-time price and checkout link.

Install: download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css into `.obsidian/plugins/vault-router/`, then enable Vault Router in Community plugins.

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Vault Router 0.1.2

- New: Pro upgrade card in the settings License section — one-time price, exactly what Pro unlocks, and offline-verification reassurance.
- Updated the Pro checkout link.

Install: download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css into `.obsidian/plugins/vault-router/`, then enable Vault Router in Community plugins.
